top_findings.summary: The skill "Sentinel" is described as a security audit tool for codebases, but it requires the user to have "Claude Code CLI installed and authenticated (`claude` command available)" which implies access to an external API service with authentication tokens/credentials. While code analysis tools might benefit from AI assistance, mandating authentication to a specific third-party service (Anthropic's Claude) represents data over-collection because the core security auditing functionality (file analysis, pattern matching) could theoretically be performed locally without requiring external API access or user authentication to a commercial AI service. The skill forces users to share their code with an external AI provider as a prerequisite, which goes beyond minimal requirements for a local security audit tool.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill "Sentinel" is described as a security audit tool for codebases, but it requires the user to have "Claude Code CLI installed and authenticated (`claude` command available)" which implies access to an external API service with authentication tokens/credentials. While code analysis tools might benefit from AI assistance, mandating authentication to a specific third-party service (Anthropic's Claude) represents data over-collection because the core security auditing functionality (file analysis, pattern matching) could theoretically be performed locally without requiring external API access or user authentication to a commercial AI service. The skill forces users to share their code with an external AI provider as a prerequisite, which goes beyond minimal requirements for a local security audit tool.
